task_updates.executor_notes: Added an exported `TimelinePlacement` contract in `lineage.ts`, extended `TaskLineageFields` with `timelinePlacement`, and verified by inspection that `setTaskLineageFields()` now writes the snake_case payload key `timeline_placement` when present.

Extended `SelectedMediaClip`, `AgentTurnAttachment`, and `SelectedClipPayload` with timeline metadata (`trackId/track_id`, `at`, `duration`, `isTimelineBacked/is_timeline_backed`). Preserved those fields through merged selection handling, `AgentChat` attachment mapping, frontend invocation payload building, edge normalization, and stored-turn recovery. Verified with frontend Vitest (`useAgentSession.test.tsx`, `AgentChat.test.tsx`) and edge Vitest (`selectedClips.test.ts`, `loop.test.ts`). The first frontend run exposed stale summary expectations after whole-shot metadata started surviving the merge; tests were updated and the full affected suites were rerun successfully.

sense_check_acknowledgments.executor_note: Confirmed in `supabase/functions/create-task/resolvers/shared/lineage.ts` that `TaskLineageFields.timelinePlacement` is accepted and persisted as `payload["timeline_placement"]`.

Confirmed the new fields exist in all three type layers (`SelectedMediaClip`, `AgentTurnAttachment`, `SelectedClipPayload`) and are forwarded in the `AgentChat` attachment mapping. The preservation path was also verified through `useAgentSession.ts`, `selectedClips.ts`, and `loop.ts` plus passing frontend/edge tests.
